name: brand-voice
description: Brand Voice transforms scattered brand materials into enforceable AI guardrails — automatically. It searches across Lark Wiki, Lark Drive, Lark Wiki, Gong, Lark IM, and meeting transcripts to distill your strongest brand signals into a single source of truth, then applies them to every piece of AI-generated content. The more your team creates with Claude, the more consistent your brand becomes.
